content.en:
Cloud World.

Ye Tian and the other invincibles descended here, but the other invincibles had been secretly preparing to evacuate, vaguely tearing the barrier between heaven and earth, lest there be no time to escape.

This is a necessary preparation, after all, no matter how careful you are to hunt a robbery beast.

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, you are an invincible person with the power of a clone. It is said that except for some special invincibles, other invincibles have no way to condense a clone. The Ancestor of the Dragon Calamity, the deputy mountain master of the Calamity Black Mountain, spoke.

"It's just a distinction between yourself, it's not much use!"

Ye Tian didn't reveal much and said perfunctorily.

The Dragon Calamity Ancestor didn't ask too much, this time their mission was to hunt down the robbers.

The main combat power this time is not Ye Tian, but the Dragon Calamity Ancestor of the Calamity Black Mountain, and the Ten Thousand Yuan Sword Ancestor of the Sky Sword Tomb, these two invincible people are much stronger than Ye Tian, although Ye Tian can have the top fifth-rank ancestor combat power, as soon as he breaks through the invincible ancestor, he has this kind of combat power, which is indeed very terrifying.

But the gap between the invincible ancestor who had just broken through and the fifth-rank invincible ancestor was incomparably huge, and it was not an exaggeration to say that it was a hundredfold gap.

And although some invincibles have not created invincible ancestral skills and cannot become fifth-rank invincibles, if they cultivate high enough, they still have the combat power of fifth-rank invincibles, and even surpass ordinary fifth-rank invincibles.

And the Dragon Calamity Ancestor and the Ten Thousand Yuan Sword Ancestor are the combat power with the threshold of a fifth-class invincible, which is far from being comparable to the average new invincible.

However, the Thirty-Seven Tribulation Beasts also have the combat power of infinitely close to the fifth-rank invincible, and it is impossible for the sixth-rank invincible to destroy such a robbery beast, after all, if the difference in strength is not very huge, it is difficult to distinguish life and death in the battle between the invincible.

For example, the ancestor of the dragon calamity is stronger than the Thirty-Seven Tribulation Tribulation Beasts, but he still can't kill the Thirty-Seven Tribulation Tribulation Beasts.

This was still at the time of the Cloud Mist World Tribulation, and if the Great Tribulation passed, they would not be able to hunt such a tribulation beast.

In addition, it is very likely that the Tribulation Beasts of the Thirty-Seven Tribulations will hold a certain amount of heaven and earth authority, and temporarily let the power of the Great Tribulation retreat, so that the invincible will need to withstand the suppression from the rules of heaven and earth, and their strength will be greatly reduced.

At that time, under the suppression of the rules of Cloud Heaven and Earth, even the ancestor of the Dragon Calamity would not be an opponent of the beast robbery.

Therefore, they need to jointly besiege and kill the beasts of the Thirty-Seven Tribulations, otherwise they will not succeed at all.

"This is it!"

Ye Tian pointed to the space-time node not far away and said.

The invincible people of Calamity Black Mountain and the Firmament Sword Tomb did not approach, but let Ye Tian attack the space-time node, confirming that this tribulation beast was only a tribulation beast of the thirty-seventh tribulation, and they would make a move.

So, Ye Tian didn't hesitate to make a move.

Rumble!!!

The space-time node shattered, and a robbery beast carrying monstrous anger appeared, its huge body occupying the area, and the terrifying aura made ordinary invincibles tremble.

Thirty tribulation patterns were revealed on this robbing beast, proving its strength.

"It's really a beast of the Thirty-Seven Tribulations!"

The invincible people of Calamity Black Mountain and the invincible people of the Firmament Sword Tomb were pleasantly surprised.

"Let's shoot!"

The Ancestor of the Dragon Calamity spoke.

Bang!!!!!

Ten invincible men shot together and easily crushed the beast.

In a short time, all the body of this beast was full of pits, countless blood flowed out, and the injuries were extremely serious.

Abrupt.

This tribulation beast mobilized the authority of the cloud and mist heaven and earth, and retreated the power of the great calamity.

All of a sudden, several invincible people were shocked by the rules of Cloud Mist Heaven and Earth, and their strength was greatly damaged in an instant.

However, they are invincible after all, but their strength is suppressed.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian's copy body was suppressed by the rules, and at the same time, half of his body was blown up by the desperate blow of the robber beast, and he was immediately injured.

If the replicating body is injured, it will step back and let the clone be on top of it, giving the replicating body time to recover from the injury.

In this way, an invincible person was injured and retreated, only the Dragon Calamity Ancestor and the Ten Thousand Yuan Sword Ancestor were not injured at all, after all, their strength was above the beast robbery, even if they were suddenly suppressed by the rules and their strength was greatly reduced, it was enough to ensure that they were not injured.

It was not without a price to hold the authority of heaven and earth, so soon this beast could no longer control the authority of heaven and earth, and its strength became lower and lower due to its injuries.

At last.

The beast was killed, and its massive body lay motionless in the void.

The robber beast was dead, and the invincibles breathed a sigh of relief, and at the same time showed a look of excitement.

A thirty-seven tribulation beast is worth a lot of money.

Whoa!!!

The body of the robbery beast began to disintegrate, and the dense origin rule robbery crystal flew out of the robbery beast's body.

The number of these Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals can far exceed that of the First Tribulation Beast, there were more than 10,000 Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals on the body of the First Tribulation Beast, but there were more than 100,000 Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals on this thirty-seven Tribulation Beast.

In addition to more than 100,000 Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals, thirteen Tribulation Bloods also flew out, as well as bones that exuded a powerful aura.

"Let's divide the origin rules first!"

The Ancestor of the Dragon Calamity proposed.

"Yes!" Ye Tian agreed.

After discussion, Ye Tian was equivalent to the combat power of two invincible people, plus he was the planner and discoverer of this hunting beast, so he naturally gained more Origin Rule Tribulation, so he got 20,000 Origin Rule Tribulation.

This was a huge gain for Ye Tian, the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal on his body was exhausted, all in order to break through the invincible.

At the beginning, he obtained more than 5,000 Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, nearly 6,000 techniques, plus the Origin Rule Robbery Crystals obtained from one force after another, and went to play in foreign worlds, clashed with other forces, and killed the strongest one by one, and also obtained some Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, a total of more than 6,000.

However, the main body plus the clone broke through the invincible realm twice, and more than 6,000 origin rule robbery crystals were just enough, and all of them were consumed.

But now that he has obtained more than 20,000 Origin Rule Robbery Crystals at once, his net worth has suddenly become rich again.

For the invincible, the value of the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal is not small, which is equivalent to the existence of currency, if you go to the Eternal Heaven and Earth in the future, you will not be able to buy anything without the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal.

After dividing these Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals, everyone began to divide the Thirteen Pills of Blood.

"I want two copies of blood!

Ye Tian said.

Ten invincible people are divided into thirteen parts of blood, he is equivalent to two invincible people, as long as two parts of blood, this is definitely less.

But he knew very well that the blood of the Thirty-Seven Tribulation Tribulation Beasts was far from being comparable to the One Tribulation Tribulation Beast, and it was too helpful to the invincible, far from being comparable to those Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals.

He was weak now, so there was no need to compete with these powerful invincibles for more blood.

"Yes!"

Seeing that Ye Tian only needed two copies of the blood, the other invincible people immediately readily agreed.
